name: lepton-cli
description: Operate NVIDIA DGX Cloud Lepton through the globally installed `lep` CLI.

interface.shortDescription: Operate DGX Cloud Lepton from Codex.
interface.longDescription: Use the globally installed lep CLI to inspect and manage NVIDIA DGX Cloud Lepton workspaces, endpoints, jobs, pods, storage, secrets, queues, nodes, ingress, templates, logs, authentication, and workspace status.
defaultPrompt: Use the Lepton CLI skill to list endpoints in my workspace.
Use the Lepton CLI skill to inspect my running jobs.
Use the Lepton CLI skill to check workspace status.
